turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Hi there, I’d like to book a routine check-up for next week, ideally a weekday morning.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Esta llamada puede ser grabada para propósitos de calidad y entrenamiento. Para Español, oprima el 2.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Great, thanks. So,

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I can help with that.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Oh, I already have

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Before we get started, would you like to create a DevoPatient profile?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Sure, my name is Jordan Miller.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I just need your first and last name.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Your patient profile is set up.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: It's March 14

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: and your date of birth.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Actually, my date

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: is July 4th, 2000.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: How can I help you today?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: I’m looking to book a routine check-up for next week, preferably in the morning on a weekday.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: We have a morning opening for a routine checkup on Monday, June 29th at 1130 with Kelley Noble, MD.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to book this slot?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: 11:30 on Monday sounds a bit late. Do you have anything a bit earlier, maybe around 9 or 10 a.m.?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Or would you prefer to hear other weekday morning options next week?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: The earliest available slot on Monday is 11.30 a.m.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Alright,

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: There's nothing earlier that day.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to hear about morning openings on Tuesday or another day next week?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Yes, please. Could you let me know if there's anything earlier on Tuesday morning?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Yes

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: That sounds perfect. Let

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: There is a 9 a.m. slot available on Tuesday, June 30th with...

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: C. Bignew-Lukosky, MD.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to book this appointment?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Yes, let's go ahead and book that 9 a.m. slot on Tuesday with Dr. Lukoski. Thanks.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Your routine checkup is booked for Tuesday, June 30th at 9 a.m. with Dr. Zbigniew Lukoski.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Got it, I’ll bring those along.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Please bring your photo ID, insurance card, a list of your current medications, and any imaging discs if you have them.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: No, that’s all. Thanks for your help. Goodbye.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Is there anything else I can help you with today?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: You're all set for your appointment.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Have a great day.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Goodbye.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Goodbye! Take care.
